answers.what-who-where: Marketing managers at mid-size SaaS companies, working in small growth teams, who need to operationalize AI for daily workflows without writing code.
answers.why-this-problem: Today they context-switch between ChatGPT and Notion AI for 5+ hours a week, and have no way to ship a team plugin that captures their workflow.
answers.how-it-works: The harness interviews the user through 5 fixed questions, assembles an idea plan, and emits a Codex-layout plugin with plugin.json, SKILL.md, and an empty .mcp.json. The plugin installs identically into Claude Code and Codex.
answers.ai-usage: An AI-research mode can draft answer drafts from a one-line idea using the runtime's tool surface (Bash / WebFetch / WebSearch in Claude Code, equivalents in Codex). The user-driven mode reads from stdin.
answers.how-verified: Each of the 7 build steps emits an AC suite covering emit, validate, idempotency, escape-injection, and schema-roundtrip. The validator runs the emitted plugin.json against the vendored Codex schema.
